description: After a project, an agent must create an FAQ document for the client's employees about the new system that was implemented.

nodes.task_description: Review project documents and training materials to identify common questions and potential areas of confusion.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of likely questions.

nodes.task_description: For each question, draft a clear and concise answer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes helpful and accurate answers.

nodes.task_description: Format the content into a structured Q&A document.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a well-organized FAQ document.
